      "It is a war and strategy board wargame.",
      "It is in the Axis and Allies series."

      "It has minor aligned powers.",

      "It has victory conditions for both sides."

      "It is characterized by representing specific empires and countries.",
      "It is characterized by purchasing new units each turn.",
      "It is characterized by movement of units across the board.",
      "It is characterized by resolving battles using 6 sided dice.",
      "It is characterized by collecting income based on owned territories.",
      "It is characterized by contested territories losing IPC value.",
      "It is characterized by optional rules like the Russian Revolution."
    ],

      "It is used for representing the German Empire, Austria-Hungary, the Ottoman Empire, the United Kingdom, France, the Russian Empire, the Kingdom of Italy, and the United States of America.",

      "It is used for purchasing new units.",
      "It is used for attacking.",

  "japanese": {
    "IsA": [
      "それは戦争戦略ボードゲームです。",
      "それはAxis and Alliesシリーズのゲームです。"
    ],
    "HasA": [
      "それはヨーロッパ、アフリカ、近東の戦域を持っています。",
      "それはロシア革命ルールを持っています。",
      "それは小規模同盟国を持っています。",
      "それは小規模中立国を持っています。",
      "それは両陣営の勝利条件を持っています。"
    ],
    "HasFeatureOf": [
      "それは第一次世界大戦に焦点を当てていることが特徴です。",
      "それは歴史の正確なシミュレーションではないことが特徴です。",
      "それはバランスの取れた合理化されたゲームプレイが特徴です。",
      "それは特定の帝国と国を表していることが特徴です。",
      "それはターンごとに新しいユニットを購入することが特徴です。",
      "それはボード上でのユニットの移動が特徴です。",
      "それは6面ダイスを使用して戦闘を解決することが特徴です。",
      "それは所有領土に基づいて収入を徴収することが特徴です。",
      "それは係争中の領土がIPC価値を失うことが特徴です。",
      "それはロシア革命のようなオプションルールがあることが特徴です。"
    ],
    "UsedFor": [
      "それはドイツ帝国、オーストリア＝ハンガリー帝国、オスマン帝国、イギリス、フランス、ロシア帝国、イタリア王国、アメリカ合衆国を表すために使用されます。",
      "それは工業生産クレジットを生み出す領土を獲得するために使用されます。",
      "それは新しいユニットを購入するために使用されます。",
      "それは攻撃するために使用されます。",
      "それはボード上でのユニットの移動に使用されます。",
      "それは損傷した戦艦を修理するために使用されます。",
      "それは戦闘を解決するために使用されます。",
      "それは購入したユニットをボード上に配置するために使用されます。",
      "それは収入を徴収するために使用されます。",
      "それは小規模同盟国の領土で歩兵を獲得するために使用されます。"
    ],

      "unknown"
    ],

      "それは小規模中立国で構成されています。",
      "それはアメリカ合衆国の国籍に関する規則で構成されています。",

IsA: It is a war and strategy board wargame.
It is in the Axis and Allies series.
HasA: It has European, African, and Near East theaters.
It has a Russian Revolution rule.
It has victory conditions for both sides.
HasFeatureOf: It is characterized by focusing on World War I.
It is characterized by not being an accurate simulation of history.
It is characterized by balanced and streamlined gameplay.
It is characterized by representing specific empires and countries.
It is characterized by purchasing new units each turn.
It is characterized by movement of units across the board.
It is characterized by resolving battles using 6 sided dice.
It is characterized by collecting income based on owned territories.
It is characterized by contested territories losing IPC value.
It is characterized by optional rules like the Russian Revolution.
UsedFor: It is used for representing the German Empire, Austria-Hungary, the Ottoman Empire, the United Kingdom, France, the Russian Empire, the Kingdom of Italy, and the United States of America.
It is used for gaining territories producing Industrial Production Credits.
It is used for purchasing new units.
It is used for attacking.
It is used for moving units across the board.
It is used for repairing damaged battleships.
It is used for resolving battles.
It is used for placing purchased units on the board.
It is used for collecting income.
It is used for gaining infantry in minor aligned territories.
CreatedBy: It was created by Larry Harris.
CreatedIn: It was created in the context of the Axis and Allies series.
PublishedIn: It was published by Avalon Hill.
ConsistsOf: It consists of phases: Purchase and Repair Units, Movement, Conduct Combat, Mobilize new units, and Collect income.
It consists of minor aligned powers.
It consists of minor neutral powers.
It consists of rules regarding United States Neutrality.
It consists of an optional Russian Revolution rule.
PartOf: It is part of the Axis and Allies series.
KnownFor: It is known for focusing on World War I.
It is known for its streamlined gameplay.
It is known for representing specific empires and countries.
It is known for its victory conditions involving capturing capitals.
AssociatedWith: It is associated with Larry Harris.
It is associated with Avalon Hill.
It is associated with World War I.
It is associated with the German Empire.
It is associated with Austria-Hungary.
It is associated with the Ottoman Empire.
It is associated with the United Kingdom.
It is associated with France.
It is associated with the Russian Empire.
It is associated with the Kingdom of Italy.
About: It is about World War I.
It is about the European, African, and Near East theaters.
It is about the German Empire.
It is about Austria-Hungary.
It is about the Ottoman Empire.
It is about the United Kingdom.
It is about France.
It is about the Russian Empire.
It is about the Kingdom of Italy.
It is about the United States of America.
